# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Flexible Build and Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Custom build commands (e.g., make, npm run build)'
        required: true
        default: 'echo "No custom build script provided. Skipping build step."'
      deploy_script:
        description: 'Custom deployment commands (e.g., scp, kubectl apply)'
        required: true
        default: 'echo "No custom deploy script provided. Skipping deploy step."'

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Execute Custom Build Script
        run: |
          echo "Running custom build script:"
          echo "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"
          /bin/bash -c "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"

      - name: Execute Custom Deployment Script
        run: |
          echo "Running custom deployment script:"
          echo "${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_script }}"
          /bin/bash -c "${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_script }}"
